shortAnswer: RBC (red blood cells) carry oxygen from the lungs to the body's tissues. A low count may indicate anemia, while a high count can suggest dehydration. Discuss any abnormal results with your doctor.
metaDescription: RBC / red blood cells low or high? Normal ranges, causes, and what it means for your health — explained simply.
doctorQuestions: Which nutrient deficiency could be causing this?
pageTitle: RBC value — Red Blood Cells explained | Medyra
